title: My Beautiful Country
original_title: My Beautiful Country - Die Brücke am Ibar
overview: A moving love story in a time of hatred: During the civil war in Kosovo, the young Serbian widow Danica falls in love with Ramiz, a Albanian soldier who, wounded in battle, seeks refuge in her home on the Serbian side of the River Ibar.
